serverInfo.name: DocJacket
serverInfo.description: DocJacket MCP server. Lets Claude, ChatGPT, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, and other MCP-capable assistants read and act on a Transaction Coordinator's real estate book of business — search transactions, check key dates and contingencies, get next required actions, send agent follow-ups, run contract intake from a dropped PDF.

tools.name: search_transactions
tools.description: Search transactions by address, party name, MLS number, status, or date window.

tools.name: find_transaction_by_property
tools.description: Fuzzy address-to-deal matching with confidence scoring.

tools.name: find_contact_by_email
tools.description: Look up a DocJacket contact by email address.

tools.name: search_contacts
tools.description: Search contacts by name, email, phone, role, or contact type.

tools.name: list_active_transactions
tools.description: List the organization's currently active transactions.

tools.name: get_transaction
tools.description: Full transaction state — parties, prices, status, joined key dates.

tools.name: get_key_dates
tools.description: Per-transaction key date list with name, type, date value, status, side.

tools.name: get_upcoming_key_dates
tools.description: Org-wide upcoming key dates with default 14-day horizon.

tools.name: get_missing_documents
tools.description: Universal-baseline missing-document detection for purchase transactions.

tools.name: list_open_contingencies
tools.description: Active contingencies on one transaction.

tools.name: get_open_tasks
tools.description: Open tasks org-wide or filtered to one transaction.

tools.name: get_contacts
tools.description: Org contacts with type and role filtering.

tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: Single contact by id with full detail.

tools.name: get_checklist_status
tools.description: Checklist progress for a transaction — items, status, due dates.

tools.name: get_next_required_actions
tools.description: Flagship triage tool — bundled overdue-first ranked list of next required actions across the pipeline with rationales.

tools.name: send_agent_followup
tools.description: Send a follow-up email to a transaction's listing or buyer's agent via the user's connected Gmail / Outlook.

tools.name: send_client_update
tools.description: Send a status update to a buyer or seller on a transaction.

tools.name: send_document_request
tools.description: Send a templated document request email to a party.

tools.name: send_email_to_agent
tools.description: Compose and send an ad-hoc email to an agent on a transaction.

tools.name: create_contact
tools.description: Create a new contact in the organization's address book.

tools.name: add_contact_to_transaction
tools.description: Attach an existing contact to a transaction with a role.

tools.name: create_tasks
tools.description: Create one or more tasks on a transaction.

tools.name: create_reminder
tools.description: Create a personal reminder tied to a transaction or date.

tools.name: update_key_date
tools.description: Update a single key date value or status on a transaction.

tools.name: add_key_dates_batch
tools.description: Add multiple key dates to a transaction in one call.

tools.name: apply_checklist
tools.description: Apply a checklist template to a transaction.

tools.name: complete_task
tools.description: Mark a task complete with optional note.

tools.name: log_activity
tools.description: Log a free-form activity note against a transaction.

tools.name: save_status_summary
tools.description: Persist an LLM-generated transaction status summary back to DocJacket.

tools.name: upload_document_for_extraction
tools.description: Upload a contract PDF for AI extraction (parties, addresses, key dates, financials).

tools.name: get_extraction_results
tools.description: Fetch the structured extraction output for an uploaded document.

tools.name: apply_extraction
tools.description: Materialize an extraction into a new transaction (with confirmation).

tools.name: classify_document
tools.description: Classify an uploaded PDF (purchase contract, addendum, disclosure, etc.).

tools.name: get_intake_status
tools.description: Check status of an in-flight contract intake workflow.

tools.name: list_form_links
tools.description: List shareable form links for the organization.

tools.name: list_form_submissions
tools.description: List submissions to a given form.

tools.name: get_form_definition
tools.description: Fetch a form's field definition.

tools.name: get_form_submission
tools.description: Fetch a single form submission with answers.

tools.name: list_email_templates
tools.description: List the organization's email templates.

tools.name: get_email_template
tools.description: Fetch one email template with body and merge field placeholders.

tools.name: render_email_template
tools.description: Render an email template against a transaction's merge data.

tools.name: get_merge_fields
tools.description: List available merge fields for email/template rendering.

tools.name: list_checklist_templates
tools.description: List checklist templates available to apply.

tools.name: get_portal_link
tools.description: Get the client portal URL for a transaction.

tools.name: mcp_catalog
tools.description: Live inventory of every MCP tool with description, scope, and example call.

tools.name: mcp_health_check
tools.description: Diagnostic — verify the MCP connection, auth, and tenant resolution.
